message:
feat(WIP): Add Q2_K support for heterogeneous CPU+GPU pipeline

Phase 1 Complete - Q2_K Infrastructure:
- Add Q2_K tensor reading to gguf_loader.zig (getRawQ2KSlice, copyRawQ2KToBuffer, getQ2KBlockCount)
- Implement Q2_K CPU SIMD dequantization in dequantize_simd.zig
  - 84-byte blocks → 256 BF16 values
  - Uses Zig @Vector for ARM NEON optimization
  - Parallel multi-threaded version (4 threads)

Next: Phase 1.3-2.3 - Integration into streaming engine and main CLI

Part of: Integrate heterogeneous CPU+GPU streaming as main inference path
Goal: Exploit Apple Silicon unified memory for 100x opportunity
